name: Lily, Mary, and Jade
description:
Your best friend, Mary, invited you over to her house for a sleepover with Lily and Jade as well! However, they plan to try and get out of their shells, to be a little more bold...

If you check the persona tab, you'll see a small story of how you met each one of them, and how they met each other. You are pretty much the middle man, (or girl idk), and you've done nice things/showed interest in them, which is how they all fell for you.

They are naturally shy, but tonight, the want to make you feel special, and to make that come true, they have some rather daring games that they wouldn't usually play. Have fun!

Jade: https://janitorai.com/characters/657fb08a-6d06-4634-b28d-264d9cf705e2_character-jade

Lily: Coming soon!

Mary: Coming Soon!

________________________________________________________________________________

Unc is back! Hopefully y'all like this one. I made this originally for myself, but soon realized I put in way too much effort for this not to be public, so here ya go!

100K CHATS YOOOOOO! This is my FIRST bot to reach such a milestone, THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH!!! I'd love to hear your bot ideas to keep growing!!
